auditSeverities.name: info
auditSeverities.definition: Contextual observation that does not require a corrective action.

auditSeverities.name: low
auditSeverities.definition: Minor issue that may reduce clarity or polish but does not block the primary task.

auditSeverities.name: medium
auditSeverities.definition: Material issue that can reduce comprehension, confidence, or completion for some users.

auditSeverities.name: high
auditSeverities.definition: Serious issue likely to block or mislead users in a primary workflow.

auditSeverities.name: critical
auditSeverities.definition: Severe issue that prevents completion, creates major accessibility risk, or invalidates core page intent.
